label: KSafe
description: Karoo safety extension: crash detection, manual SOS, check-in timer, plus optional HR-based medical episode and wellness detection. Sends alerts via WhatsApp (CallMeBot), Telegram, Pushover or ntfy. Beta version, use with care.
releaseNotes: Added Health tab with HR-based detection (requires paired heart-rate sensor). Medical episode detection — HR flatline or sudden collapse — triggers an emergency alert to your contacts. Wellness monitor warns on-screen when HR stays high for a sustained period. Each detector has a configurable response level (silent / warning / emergency).
